info.title: SHEES API
info.description: Safety, Health, Environment & Emergency System - RESTful API for incident management, training, inspections, and worker tracking.

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password, returns Bearer token

ttl_minutes.description: Token time to live in minutes (default: 7 days)

post.description: Revoke the current user's mobile access token

get.description: Retrieve the profile of the authenticated user
Retrieve a paginated list of incidents. Non-admin users see only their own incidents.

post.description: Create a new safety incident. Supports offline sync with temporary_id.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific incident

post.description: Synchronize data from offline mobile/field app. Supports bidirectional sync with conflict resolution.

device_id.description: Unique device identifier for tracking offline changes

last_synced_at.description: Timestamp of the last successful sync

data.description: Offline-modified data organized by entity type

reported_by.description: User ID who reported the incident

bearer_token.description: Login with email and password to get the authentication token
bearer_token.name: Token
